'''Benjamin Laguerre''' (born 13 September 2001) is a French professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|wg}}er for [[Toulouse Olympique]] in the [[Super League]].

==Background==
Laguerre was born in [[Marseille]], [[Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France]].

He played [[rugby union]] at school, before taking up rugby league with [[Marseille XIII Avenir]] and later joined the youth sections of [[RC Salon XIII]].

==Career==
Laguerre joined the [[Toulouse Olympique]] Academy in 2019. Following the [[COVID-19]] [[COVID-19 pandemic in France#Lockdown measures|lockdown]] he made appearances for the [[Toulouse Olympique Broncos]] side in the [[Super XIII|Elite One Championship]] and joined the first team squad for training.

In April 2021 he made his professional début for [[Toulouse Olympique|Toulouse]] in the [[RFL Championship]] against the [[Halifax Panthers]].<ref name="co.uk">{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/match/EVP3534990|title=Halifax Panthers v Toulouse - Rugby League - BBC Sport|website=bbc.co.uk|access-date=2026-05-24}}</ref>

Laguerre made his [[Super League]] début for [[Toulouse Olympique|TO]] in September 2022 against [[St Helens RLFC|St Helens]].<ref name="co.uk2">{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/62752764|title=Super League: St Helens 36-16 Toulouse Olympique - Six-try Saints finish off relegated French side - BBC Sport|website=bbc.co.uk|access-date=2026-05-24}}</ref>

He was named in the [[France national rugby league team|France]] squad for the [[2026 Rugby League World Cup|2026 Rugby League World Cup qualifier]] with [[Jamaica national rugby league team|Jamaica]] in Autumn 2025 but did not play.<ref name="seriousaboutrl">{{cite web|url=https://www.seriousaboutrl.com/france-squad-named-for-world-cup-play-off-with-hull-kr-wigan-warriors-and-wakefield-trinity-men-included-108802/|title=France squad named for World Cup play-off with Hull KR, Wigan Warriors and Wakefield Trinity men included - Serious About Rugby League|website=seriousaboutrl.com|access-date=2026-05-24}}</ref><ref name="ffr13">{{cite web|url=https://www.ffr13.fr/joueur/benjamin-laguerre/|title=Benjamin Laguerre - Fédération Française de Rugby à XIII  |website=ffr13.fr|access-date=2026-05-24}}</ref>
